name: POLICY-BUG-19
title: Three-way version mismatch: feature.json 1.3.0 vs spec.md/contract.md 1.4.0; test file name lies about spec version
description: feature.json declares 'version': '1.3.0' while both spec.md and contract.md declare version: 1.4.0. POLICY-BUG-7 (test-policy-bug-fixes.py:73) only checks spec<->contract alignment, missing the third leg (feature.json). The invariants test on disk is named test-policy-invariants-v1-3-0.py but tests spec.md at 1.4.0 - either spec was bumped without test rename (drift) or test should be renamed. Fix: pick the correct version, sync all three locations, rename or replace the test to match, and extend POLICY-BUG-7's check to cover feature.json.
